title: Morning after Sam — embrace the wave, you-vs-you world, deploy yourself next time
html:
Morning after Sam — embrace the wave, you-vs-you world, deploy yourself next time

Source: 2024-05-07 Google Doc. Yahir's morning-after the Sam Solum breakup. One of two May 7 docs (the other titled "things ending with sam") — together they bookend the breakup. This is the recovery-doc.

TL;DR

  • The state: still naturally unstable. Struggled to get out of bed. Listening to music that's "both stimulating but numbing."
  • The operating principle: "I cant block or ignore the feeling. I must embrace whatever is going thru me and I must be aware of it." — same awareness as regulation move he later uses in the Shanghai phone loss doc.
  • The wave imagery: "Waves come in rushing feeling of sadness, of sabotage." Anti-numbing instinct.
  • The relapse moment named: "I downloaded instagram to look at her page, but that kind of thing I must stop."
  • The cosmology: "It really is a you vs you world. Beautiful people exist within it, but you are on your own. Love those that are apart of your journey to the max capacity, go beyond it."
  • The honest reframe of the arc: "Throughout the 6 months of seeing sam, I was hooked from the beginning. I forget this, but thats the truth. Since october I have been hooked. The major source of my happiness was getting texts from sam, and seeing her." — corrects the Feb 14 doc's "I'm not head over heels" framing in retrospect.
  • The lesson extracted for next time: "If I like someone, I do need to go beyond the dinner date. Coffee meetups, lets study together, trying to go on a walk, lets go to the animal shelter, come and chill, lets watch a movie, workout? If you want to get to know someone be strategic, deploy yourself and see if you really like them and if they really like you too."
  • The optimism guardrail: "You must learn from this, but do not and you cannot allow this to jade you further."
  • The closer cosmology: "The present is the only thing that matters, everything you see will be gone and thats what makes it special. Things must feel like they were meant to be, listen to the universe, it will present things to you, and it is up to your free will to accept or deny it. Usually accept it."

Pattern observed

This doc is the closing chapter of the Sam arc — opens at Feb 14 (no Valentine, dopamine from snaps), escalates at April 30 (yearn fully arrived), collapses here on May 7. The retrospective honesty ("hooked from the beginning") is something Yahir couldn't see in real time — useful template for reading earlier romance docs against later ones.

The "deploy yourself" lesson is operational — Yahir is converting heartbreak into product-spec for next-time. Ties to the same strategic-relational instinct Yahir applies to Emily (varied date types, going beyond the obvious meeting) and to CIEE social rebuilding (the strategic re-engagement texts to Saanya in the October doc).

The "you vs you world" cosmology is pre-Austin, pre-McGregor-credo Yahir — already the manifesto register is forming, but in service of recovery rather than ambition. Same voice, gentler register.

Key quotes

  • "I cant block or ignore the feeling. I must embrace whatever is going thru me and I must be aware of it."
  • "It really is a you vs you world."
  • "If you want to get to know someone be strategic, deploy yourself."
  • "Listen to the universe, it will present things to you... usually accept it."

Open questions

  • The companion "things ending with sam" doc from same day — what does it contain? (Worth ingesting next.)
  • The breakup precipitating event — does it appear elsewhere? (April 30 doc covers backstory, this doc covers aftermath; the breakup itself isn't documented.)
  • Did Yahir actually unsubscribe from Instagram?
